title: Backup, Point-in-Time Recovery, Rebuild, and Disaster Reconciliation · Concurrent Code Workshop
summary: A public-interest newsroom incrementally builds rehearsed feed-service recovery system from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, and PostgreSQL fixtures while retaining prior Go, HTTP-client, HTTP-server, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, cancellation, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of rehearsed feed-service recovery system while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, caus…
objectives: Assign RPO, RTO, retention, encryption, restore, and rebuild strategy separately to accounts, subscriptions, reader state, feeds, entries, raw evidence, and telemetry.
Verify scheduled backups, WAL continuity, encryption, access, checksums, catalog, age, capacity, and restore eligibility.
Restore into isolation, validate schema and application versions, reconcile counts and invariants, and prevent outbound fetching during inspection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Go Data Class Recovery
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go team handles case 6612 during a publisher-fairness incident rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove data-class objectives, backup eligibility, isolated restore, safe resume order, and disaster drills; the release claim must bind source, migrations, dependencies, binary, image, configuration, and restored state; then change one schema, constraint, transaction, upsert, migration, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Go Data Class Recovery.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for assign rpo, rto, retention, encryption, restore, and rebuild strategy separately to accounts, subscriptions, reader state, feeds, entries, raw evidence, and telemetry.
